privileged_info_summary: The task uses two dynamically-created output files: /sdcard/ram_audit.txt for storing the Flight Crew View app's RAM usage value, and /sdcard/ram_evidence.png for storing a screenshot of the Running services screen. Both paths are consistently used across setup, execution, export, and verification scripts. The task operates on synthetic, interactive data generated at runtime on an Android emulator.
